findings.evidence: `rg -n "namespace MulAction|orbitRel_bot_iff|orbitRelQuotientBotEquiv" code/TauCeti` shows these public generic declarations only at `SubgroupFiberOrbit.lean:50`, `:56`, `:70`, `:85`, and `:92`; `code/TauCeti/Algebra/GroupAction/FixingSubgroup.lean` shows Tau Ceti already has a generic group-action area.
findings.fix: Move the generic `MulAction` bottom-orbit quotient API to a generic group-action file such as `TauCeti/Algebra/GroupAction/OrbitRelBot.lean` and import it here, or keep only deck-specialized declarations public in this file.
findings.issue: Public generic declarations `TauCeti.MulAction.orbitRel_bot_iff`, `orbitRelQuotientBotEquiv`, and their simp lemmas live in a deck-specific file even though they mention only `[Group G] [MulAction G X]` and no deck/fibre topology.

summary: The deck-specific bottom quotient material is now mostly in the right layer, but the PR exports generic `MulAction` orbit-quotient API from a universal-cover deck file.
